title: Leashable Collars
description: Collars, clickers, and leashing. What could go wrong?
body:
- Collars
  - Dyable.
- Clickers
  - Also dyable.
  - Forces other players to look at you.
  - Extremely cursed.
- Owner system
  - Collars can be "owned" by a player. Anyone wearing an owned collar gets some special effects...
  - Owners can use leads on wearers and drag them around.
- Paws
  - Make it difficult to hold items or interact with blocks.
- Human-Sized Dog Bed
  - ???

For more information, see the [Github Wiki](https://github.com/jlortiz0/PlayerCollars/wiki).
